steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “Assuming participant P6 gave equal ratings to the abstract and cubist paintings” tells us the model’s prediction must match that equality.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Choice C states the model predicted equal ratings, which directly follows from the assumption. The other three options either claim a difference or a preference, contradicting the equal‑rating condition. That matches choice C — C is correct.
